summary: Static code review of container deletion security and new Container/Location reports mode. **BLOCKER: PostgreSQL database not running (connection refused on localhost:5432)**. Dynamic testing not possible. All 6 requested features verified through code review.

critical.issue: PostgreSQL not installed/running on localhost:5432. App shows error on load: 'connection to server at localhost, port 5432 failed: Connection refused'

issues: Streamlit deprecation warnings: use_container_width parameter should be replaced with width='stretch' before 2025-12-31

implementation: UX: pode_apagar = int(total_palhetas) == 0 - checks stock count
UX: st.button disabled=not pode_apagar - disables button when stock > 0
UX: help tooltip explains why disabled
UX: st.caption shows 'Apagar bloqueado: contentor com stock' when blocked
Backend: deletar_contentor() has SQL validation checking SUM(existencia_atual) before delete
Radio button with 'Contentor / Localização' option added
Contentor selectbox with format_func showing container code
Proper warning when no containers registered
4-column layout with multiselect filters
Filter 1: Garanhões (garanhao column)
Filter 2: Proprietários (proprietario_nome column)
Filter 3: Canister (canister column)
Filter 4: Andar (andar column)
All with proper null handling via dropna().unique()
KPI strip: lotes, palhetas, garanhões, proprietários, canisters usados
Occupancy table grouped by (canister, andar) with palhetas sum
Dense table with columns: Proprietário, Garanhão, Stock, Canister, Andar, Data Embriovet, Data Criação, Criado Por, Ref. Externa
CSV download button for container data
Section title: 'Histórico físico do sémen'
Includes stock entry events (data_criacao or data_embriovet)
Includes internal transfers from transf table
Includes external transfers from transf_ext table
Sorted by date descending
Shows: Data, Evento, Garanhão, Proprietário, Canister, Andar, Qtd, Origem
Garanhão mode: unchanged from iteration_11
Proprietário mode: unchanged from iteration_11
Histórico Geral mode: unchanged from iteration_11

action_items: CRITICAL: Setup PostgreSQL database or configure DATABASE_URL environment variable to enable dynamic testing
Minor: Replace use_container_width=True with width='stretch' throughout app.py (Streamlit deprecation)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Delete container security: Double validation (UX disabled button + backend SQL check)
✅ Filter implementation: Proper column existence checks before filtering
✅ KPI strip uses render_kpi_strip from ui_kit.py module
✅ Physical history correctly joins stock entries with transfer tables
⚠️ Streamlit deprecation: use_container_width parameter usage throughout file
context_for_next_testing_agent: PostgreSQL database connection is BLOCKED (localhost:5432 connection refused). Static code review verified all 6 features are implemented correctly in app.py. To test dynamically: 1) Install PostgreSQL, or 2) Configure DATABASE_URL env var for remote DB. App uses psycopg2 connection pool. All UI changes for Container/Location reports mode are in place: filters at lines 3299-3326, KPIs at 3514-3521, dense table at 3531-3537, physical history at 3539-3590. Delete button security at lines 2462-2474.
rca_of_issue: PostgreSQL database not configured in this environment. The app.py expects either DATABASE_URL env var or local PostgreSQL on localhost:5432. Neither is available, causing connection pool creation to fail at app startup (line 128-133).
